subcodes.first_line: O thou namesake of 'Abdu'l-Bahá, think not that thou shalt be forgotten for a single moment. At every breath do I remember thee, and from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمی علوی عبدالبهاء گمان منما که دقیقه ای فراموش شوی دمبدم بیاد توام و از
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
